headline: All You Need to Know About VeriSign (VRSN) Rating Upgrade to Buy
summary: VeriSign (VRSN) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

headline: Sabre (SABR) Up 31.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Sabre (SABR) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: VeriSign (VRSN) Shares Slid Following Berkshire Hathaway’s Reduction of Its Stake
summary: Diamond Hill Capital, an investment management company, released its “Mid Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The fourth quarter posted another period of favorable gains for equity markets, with small and large cap positions being stronger performers, returning 2.19% and 2.41%.
